purpose: Provides a three-condition test for identifying when credit stress is sufficient to trigger a correlation regime flip toward demand-dominant/negative, producing a 60-70% probability of regime change when all three conditions are met simultaneously.
components: Condition 3: Distressed ratio (HY bonds trading >1000bp over Treasuries) exceeds 10%
current_assessment: No conditions currently met. IG OAS at ~90-110bp (well below 165-185bp threshold). HY-IG differential within normal range. Distressed ratio at ~4-6% (elevated relative to overall tightness, confirming quality bifurcation, but below 10% threshold).
limitations: Calibrated on historical episodes with different credit market structures
Covenant-lite and private credit opacity may delay conditions being met
Thresholds may need recalibration if credit market structure has fundamentally changed
Does not specify time horizon for the 60-70% probability
